title: Most interesting piece of NGE merch youve seen
display_title: Most interesting piece of NGE merch youve seen
wikitext:
[]: Most interesting piece of NGE merch you've seen?             Quote Post by Rahaquiel-2D1S » Thu Aug 10, 2006 5:30 pm GBA SP covers. Nuff said. Also pillows.

[]:             Quote Post by SukieNeko » Thu Aug 10, 2006 6:58 pm On my recent trip to Japan I saw Asuka and Rei bedsheets. I wanted them :P

[]:             Quote Post by felineki » Thu Aug 10, 2006 7:15 pm Beanbag Angels.

[]:             Quote Post by the3rdchildren » Thu Aug 10, 2006 7:57 pm SukieNeko wrote: On my recent trip to Japan I saw Asuka and Rei bedsheets. I wanted them :P

[]:             Quote Post by Rahaquiel-2D1S » Thu Aug 10, 2006 8:03 pm felineki wrote: Beanbag Angels.

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE 08 » Thu Aug 10, 2006 10:49 pm I want a Sachiel one. My favorite peice of Eva merch are these stupid little chibi figures.

[]:             Quote Post by the3rdchildren » Fri Aug 11, 2006 9:24 am The Eva-01 bike is also pretty neat.

[]:             Quote Post by darth_mark » Sat Aug 12, 2006 9:32 pm how about a nice big glass of Tang?

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Sat Aug 12, 2006 10:34 pm How about those wacky soap dishes?

[]:             Quote Post by reagen » Sun Aug 13, 2006 4:26 am My favourite would be....I dunno, all things Rei!! Hey, I got spare Asuka things if you guys want!!

[]:             Quote Post by Kaworu Nagisa » Sun Aug 13, 2006 10:33 pm ^ Me wants! I love anything Asuka! (If you are serious, please feel free to PM me)

[]:             Quote Post by Kyle » Mon Aug 14, 2006 5:24 pm Rei and Asuka perfume ,spray some of that on your Rei bed sheets to be one step closer to her........

[]:             Quote Post by Rahaquiel-2D1S » Sun Aug 20, 2006 5:51 pm Eva-01 shoes, lol

[]:             Quote Post by Darius » Sun Aug 20, 2006 6:15 pm Anything Asuka would be fine for me....=)

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE 08 » Sun Aug 20, 2006 6:22 pm I have a Gendo chibi that came with my Keel chibi....I routinely abuse it.

[]:             Quote Post by darth_mark » Sun Aug 20, 2006 10:51 pm SEELE 08 wrote: ...I routinely abuse it.

[]:             Quote Post by felineki » Sun Aug 20, 2006 11:01 pm SEELE 08 wrote: I have a Gendo chibi that came with my Keel chibi....I routinely abuse it.

[]:             Quote Post by Six Winged Angel » Mon Aug 21, 2006 1:21 am i beat you all lol :shock:

[]:             Quote Post by toReason » Mon Aug 21, 2006 2:45 am I always thought this plate was pretty cool, I want one so bad! [URL=http://imageshack.us] [/URL]

[]:             Quote Post by tinmeigut » Mon Aug 21, 2006 3:33 am The most interesting piece of merch... Gotta be a progressive knife downsized used for opening letters.
summary:
[]: Most interesting piece of NGE merch you've seen?             Quote Post by Rahaquiel-2D1S » Thu Aug 10, 2006 5:30 pm GBA SP covers. Nuff said. Also pillows.

[]:             Quote Post by SukieNeko » Thu Aug 10, 2006 6:58 pm On my recent trip to Japan I saw Asuka and Rei bedsheets. I wanted them :P

[]:             Quote Post by fel
